title: facelis retusa
intro: Facelis retusa, also known as Desert Honeysuckle or Desert Honeysuckle Bush, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Facelis retusa include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Facelis retusa typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
